title: Zonotriche decora
taxonomy: Zonotriche decora is classified within the Poaceae family of grasses. It belongs to the subfamily Chloridoideae and tribe Cynodonteae. The genus Zonotriche is part of the large and diverse family of grasses. Zonotriche decora is a species of grass native to southern Africa. Its classification helps in understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
